message:
deps: bump asupersync-conformance 0.3.0 -> 0.3.1

Published to crates.io ~1h ago (2026-04-21T23:58:52Z).

Updates:
- Workspace root Cargo.toml
- crates/frankenlibc_conformance/Cargo.toml (pinned separately)

Note: the base `asupersync` crate is NOT a dependency of this workspace;
only `asupersync-conformance` is used (by frankenlibc-membrane dev-deps,
frankenlibc-harness optional, and frankenlibc_conformance optional).
Both crates were published at 0.3.1 in parallel.

Verified via: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets (passed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
